**********************
Visualizer
**********************

This sub-package maintains :py:class:`Plots <pod_lca.visualizer.AbstractPlot>` and :py:class:`Plotters <pod_lca.visualizer.AbstractPlotter>`. A :py:class:`Plot <pod_lca.visualizer.AbstractPlot>` needs to be assigned a :py:class:`Plotter <pod_lca.visualizer.AbstractPlotter>` for it to be visualized.

-------

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 4

   plots
   plotters
